data.name: Audio2TextHandler_Build_AsrNotConfigured
data.value: ASR provider is not configured for the device: {deviceId}.

data.name: Audio2TextHandler_Handle_ProcessFailed
data.value: Failed to process the audio to text packet from device: {deviceId}.

data.value: ASR failed to convert speech text.

data.name: Audio2TextHandler_OnSpeechTextConverted_NoSpeak
data.value: Device {deviceId} no speak.

data.name: Audio2TextHandler_OnSpeechTextConverted_SpeakText
data.value: Device {deviceId} speak the text: {speechText}

data.name: Audio2TextHandler_Handle_Cancelled
data.value: ASR processing cancelled for device {DeviceId}

data.name: ServerBuilder_Initialize_ConfigNull
data.value: Config cannot be null.

data.name: ServerBuilder_WithPlugin_PluginNameNull
data.value: Plugin name cannot be null or empty.

data.name: ServerBuilder_WithPlugin_FunctionsNull
data.value: Functions cannot be null or empty.

data.name: ServerBuilder_BuildComponents_ResourceLoadFailed
data.value: Failed to load resource components. Please check the configuration and resource implementations.

data.name: ServerBuilder_BuildComponents_ProviderBuildFailed
data.value: Failed to build provider components. Please check the configuration and provider implementations.

data.value: Handler {handlerName} cancellation token has been canceled.

data.value: LLM provider is not initialized, cannot save memory for device: {deviceId}.

data.value: Memory saved successfully for device: {deviceId} with session: {sessionId}.

data.value: Failed to save memory for device: {deviceId} with session: {sessionId}.

data.name: ProviderManager_SaveMemory_ApiClientNotAvailable
data.value: ManageApiClient is not available, cannot save memory for device: {deviceId} with session: {sessionId}.

data.value: Device {deviceId} requires audio resampling from {ttsSampleRate} to {deviceSampleRate}.

data.value: The audio player status is {status}, skip the stopping.

data.value: Error processing audio file: {file}.

data.value: Processing task did not complete within timeout, forcing disposal.

data.name: FileMusicPlayer_Dispose_Error
data.value: Error waiting for processing task to complete.

data.value: Method to get or query the status or value of `{0}`

data.value: Session {sessionId} set the iot status / value, key: {key}, value: {value}

data.value: MCP Client is not initialized for device: {deviceId}.

data.value: SubMcpClient with type name '{0}' not found.

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_InvokeMcpFailed
data.value: Failed to invoke the MCP tool function: {FunctionName} in plugin: {PluginName}.

data.value: Failed to invoke the MCP tool function: {0} in plugin: {1}, and the error message is: {2}.

data.value: IoT Client is not initialized for device: {deviceId}.

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_ReturnTypeNotSpecified
data.value: Return type for function '{0}' in plugin '{1}' is not specified.

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_InvokeIoTSuccess
data.value: Invoke the iot command successfully.

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_InvalidIoTName
data.value: Invalid IoT component name format in plugin '{0}'.

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_InvokeIoTFailed
data.value: Failed to invoke the IoT tool function: {FunctionName} in plugin: {PluginName}.

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_InvokeIoTFailedDetail
data.value: Failed to invoke the IoT tool function: {0} in plugin: {1}, and the error message is: {2}.

data.name: MusicPlayer_GetMusicFilesAsync_SessionNotInit
data.value: Failed to get music files, the current session is not initialized.

data.name: MusicPlayer_GetMusicFilesAsync_NoFilesLog
data.value: {ProviderType} - {ModelName}, Failed to get music files due to no files existing for device {deviceId}.

data.name: MusicPlayer_GetMusicFilesAsync_NoFilesMsg
data.value: Failed to get music files due to no files existing.

data.name: MusicPlayer_GetMusicFilesAsync_SuccessLog
data.value: {ProviderType} - {ModelName}, Got {fileCount} music files success for device {deviceId}.

data.name: MusicPlayer_GetMusicFilesAsync_SuccessMsg
data.value: Get the music files success. Available music files: {0}

data.name: MusicPlayer_GetMusicFilesAsync_ProviderNotInit
data.value: Failed to get music files, the music provider is not initialized yet.

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_SessionNotInit
data.value: Failed to play music, the current session is not initialized.

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_PlayerNotInit
data.value: Failed to play music, the player is not initialized.

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_NoFiles
data.value: Failed to play music, there's no music files in server.

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_MusicNameEmpty
data.value: Failed to play music, the field musicName is empty.

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_FileNotFound
data.value: Failed to play music, the specified music file was not found.

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_PlayingLog
data.value: {ProviderType} - {ModelName}, Playing the music file {musicFilePath} for device {deviceId}.

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_SuccessMsg
data.value: Successfully started playing music: {0}

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_FailedLog
data.value: Failed to play music file {musicFilePath} for device {deviceId}.

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_FailedMsg
data.value: Failed to play music: {0}. Error: {1}

data.name: MusicPlayer_PlayMusic_ProviderNotInit
data.value: Failed to play music, the music provider is not initialized yet.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_CallResult
data.value: Received MCP call result: {result} for message ID {msgId} from device {deviceId}.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_InitMessage
data.value: Received MCP Initialize message from client: {deviceId}.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_ServerInfo
data.value: The server info from xiaozhi client MCP: name - {name}, version - {version}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_InvalidServerInfo
data.value: Invalid server info received from xiaozhi client MCP.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_ToolListMessage
data.value: Received MCP tool list message from client: {deviceId}.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_ToolAdded
data.value: Tool added: {ToolName}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_ToolCount
data.value: Number of tools supported by client devices: {count}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_MoreTools
data.value: Detected that there are more tools available, nextCursor: {nextCursor}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_ClientReady
data.value: All tools have been obtained, MCP client is ready.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_GetToolsFailed
data.value: Cannot get the MCP tools from client.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_ClientRequest
data.value: Received MCP client request: {method}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_ErrorResponse
data.value: Received MCP error response: {ErrorMsg}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_ErrorResponse_Exception
data.value: Received MCP error response: {0}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_CallMcpToolAsync_ToolError
data.value: Tool call error: {0}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_CallMcpToolAsync_TimeoutEx
data.value: Response timeout after {0} seconds

data.name: BaseMcpClient_SendMcpInitializeAsync_SendingInit
data.value: Device {deviceId} sending MCP Initialize request.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_SendMcpNotificationAsync_SendingNotification
data.value: Device {deviceId} sending MCP notification: {method}.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_RequestToolsListAsync_RequestTools
data.value: Device {deviceId} request tools list.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_RequestToolsListAsync_RequestToolsWithCursor
data.value: Device {deviceId} request tools list with cursor: {cursor}.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_CallMcpToolAsync_CallTool
data.value: Device {deviceId} call MCP tool: {toolName}, args: {args}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_CallMcpToolAsync_Timeout
data.value: Response timeout after {timeout} seconds for tool call: {toolName}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_CallMcpToolAsync_CallSuccess
data.value: Got the result of MCP tool call from the device {deviceId} successfully, result: {result}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_CallMcpToolAsync_WaitTimeout
data.value: Timeout while waiting for MCP tool call response: {toolName}, args: {args}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_CallMcpToolAsync_CallFailed
data.value: Failed to call MCP tool: {toolName}, args: {args}

data.name: BaseMcpClient_AddTool_ToolExists
data.value: Tool with name {ToolName} already exists, skipping.

data.name: McpEndpointClient_Build_UrlEmpty
data.value: Endpoint URL is empty, skip this mcp tpye.

data.name: McpEndpointClient_Build_InvalidSettings
data.value: Invalid model settings for {providerType}: {modelName}

data.name: McpEndpointClient_OnOpen_Connected
data.value: MCP Endpoint Client connected and initialized successfully.

data.name: DeviceMcpClient_SendMcpInitializeAsync_SendingInit
data.value: Session {sessionId} sending MCP Initialize request.

data.name: GenericOpenAI_Build_InvalidSettings
data.value: Invalid model settings for {providerType}: {modelName}

data.name: GenericOpenAI_StartDialogueAsync_NotBuilt

data.value: Detected emotion: {detectedEmotion} for segment: {segment}

data.name: GenericOpenAI_ChatAsync_UnexpectedError
data.value: Unexpected error(s) for {providerType}.

data.name: GenericOpenAI_ChatAsync_Cancelled
data.value: LLM chat cancelled, cleaning up {Count} segments

data.name: GenericOpenAI_ChatByStreamingAsync_Cancelled
data.value: LLM streaming chat cancelled, cleaning up {Count} segments

data.name: FlashMemory_Build_Built
data.value: Builded the default {providerType}: {flashMemory}

data.value: Huoshan http v3 TTS configuration is incomplete, please check AppId, AccessToken, ResourceId and speaker.

data.value: TTS synthesis failed.

data.value: FinishConnection during dispose raised an exception.

data.value: Server error: {message}

data.value: Cannot found the model file in path: {modelFilePath}.

data.name: BaseProvider_ReplaceMacDelimiters_DeviceIdNull
data.value: Device id cannot be null or empty.

data.value: Please build vad provider first.

data.value: Hidden state size mismatch. Expected {0}, got {1}

data.value: Cell state size mismatch. Expected {0}, got {1}

data.value: Loaded the onnx model: {modelName}.

data.value: Invalid onnx model: {modelName}.

data.name: SileroOnnx_Infer_Disposed
data.value: Cannot use disposed {0} instance.

data.name: SileroOnnx_Infer_SessionNotInitialized
data.value: ONNX InferenceSession is not initialized. Call Load() before Infer().

data.name: SileroOnnx_Infer_SampleCountMismatch
data.value: Expected {0} samples for {1}Hz, got {2}

data.name: SileroOnnx_ValidateInput_SamplesEmpty
data.value: Audio samples cannot be null or empty.

data.name: SileroOnnx_ValidateInput_UnsupportedSampleRate
data.value: Unsupported sample rate: {sampleRate}. Only 8000 and 16000 are supported.

data.name: SileroOnnx_ValidateInput_SampleRateChanged
data.value: Sample rate changed from {lastSr} to {newSr}, resetting model state.

data.name: SileroOnnx_Dispose_Disposed
data.value: Silero VAD v4 ONNX model disposed.

data.name: MusicProvider_Load_PathNotSet
data.value: Music folder path is not set in the settings.

data.name: MusicProvider_Load_PathNotExist
data.value: Music folder path '{MusicFolderPath}' does not exist.

data.name: MusicProvider_UpdateMusicFiles_SettingsNotInitialized
data.value: Cannot update music files because the settings are not initialized.

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_Load_BindCodePromptNotExist
data.value: The bind code prompt file does not exist: {filePath}

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_Load_BindNotFoundNotExist
data.value: The bind not found file does not exist: {filePath}

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_Load_DigitFilesCountError
data.value: The digit files folder must contain exactly 10 files for digits 0-9.

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_Load_InvalidDigitFile
data.value: Invalid digit file: {fileName}

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_Load_InvalidResourceLoading
data.value: Invalid resource loadings for {resourceName}

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_GetDeviceNotFoundAudioStream_NotLoaded
data.value: The bind not found audio file is not loaded.

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_GetDeviceBindCodeAudioStream_InvalidBindCode
data.value: Invalid bind code: {bindCode}, it must be a 6-digit numeric string.

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_GetDeviceBindCodeAudioStream_PromptNotLoaded
data.value: The bind code prompt audio file is not loaded.

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_GetDeviceBindCodeAudioStream_DigitNotLoaded
data.value: The audio file for digit '{digit}' is not loaded.

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_CombinedStream_ListEmpty
data.value: WAV files list cannot be null or empty

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_CombinedStream_FirstFileInvalid
data.value: First file is not a valid WAV file

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_CombinedStream_FileInvalid
data.value: One of the files is not a valid WAV file

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_CombinedStream_BufferOverflow
data.value: The sum of offset and count is larger than the buffer length.

data.name: DefaultDeviceBinding_CombinedStream_InvalidOrigin
data.value: Invalid seek origin

data.name: BaseOnnxModel_CheckModelExist_NotFound
data.value: Cannot found the onnx model file in path: {modelFilePath}.

data.name: ManageApiClient_LoadConfigFromApi_UnknownException
data.value: Unknown exception occurred while loading config from api: {0}

data.value: Built {providerType} - {modelName}, model name: {emotionLLMName}

data.name: ChatAgent_Build_BuiltFailed
data.value: Faild to built {providerType} - {modelName}, model name: {chatLLMName}

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_FunctionCancelled
data.value: Function invocation cancelled for {FunctionName}

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_McpCancelled
data.value: MCP tool call cancelled: {FunctionName}

data.name: MCPToolFunctionFilter_OnFunctionInvocationAsync_IoTCancelled
data.value: IoT command call cancelled: {FunctionName}

data.name: BaseHandler_OnSessionCtsTokenChanged_CtsAlreadyDisposed
data.value: {HandlerName}: Old session CTS already disposed when trying to cancel.

data.name: BaseMcpClient_HandleMcpMessageAsync_KernelNotReady
data.value: Kernel is not ready for handling MCP messages. DeviceId: {DeviceId}.

data.name: IoTClient_RegisterIoTTools_KernelNull
data.value: The Kernel is not yet ready to process IOT messages. Device ID: {DeviceId}.
